Root Cause: payment -- charge requests are being rejected by the payment service due to invalid tokens
Confidence: HIGH
Evidence:
  - Metrics: no data for `sum(rate(http_server_duration_seconds_count{service_name=~"checkout|payment"}[5m])) by (service_name, http_status_code)` in `2026-04-02T22:15:53.229909Z` to `2026-04-02T22:20:55.269033Z`; no data for `histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(http_server_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"checkout|payment"}[5m])) by (le, service_name))`; no data for `up{job=~".*payment.*|.*checkout.*"}`. This is an observability gap for metrics on the payment path.
  - Traces: trace `7b526f83f8fe03c5e35cdc180eb442b4` shows the checkout path completing `checkout/oteldemo.PaymentService/Charge` in `21.3ms` and `payment/oteldemo.PaymentService/Charge` in `15.4ms`. The same trace contains many long-lived `payment/flagd.evaluation.v1.Service/EventStream` spans around `600000ms`, but the actual charge RPC is short. Additional trace search returned 7 payment-path traces in the window, including the long trace above.
  - Logs: 6 payment log entries in the window say `Payment request failed. Invalid token. app.loyalty.level=gold`. The same window also has 6 `Charge request received.` entries and 6 checkout `[PlaceOrder]` entries, showing requests reached payment and were rejected there.
Contradictions: Traces mark the charge spans as `status=OK` and short (`15.4ms` / `21.3ms`), while logs clearly show application-level failures: `Payment request failed. Invalid token.` This suggests the service is returning a handled/business failure rather than surfacing it as a transport/span error. Also, metrics for payment/checkout are absent even though traces/logs exist.
Not Investigated: Upstream token issuer/auth source was not checked because no auth/identity service was identified in the provided topology. Frontend user-visible HTTP status codes were not checked due to the metrics gap and because the payment logs already identify the rejection reason.
Remediation: Fix the token generation/validation path used by checkout->payment, specifically for requests tagged `app.loyalty.level=gold`. Verify the token expected by payment, rotate/reseed if applicable, and add instrumentation so business-level payment rejections emit explicit error metrics and error span status.
```
